title: Land Of The Losts
description: Modpack with a mix of vanilla-like and cool/useful things tailored for use in a private server
body:
![Banner of the modpack Land Of The Losts as shown in game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67e13761a04802192492e368eb7d2fd33a94e860.png)

## THIS MODPACK HAS BEEN TAILORED FOR USE IN A SPECIFIC SERVER
### FULL FUNCIONALITY OUTSIDE OF IT CANNOT BE GRANTED 
#
A carefully curated collection of mods designed to enhance the Minecraft experience while maintaining the beloved Vanilla feel. From quality of life improvements to new exploration opportunities and minor tweaks, it aims to provide a balanced and enjoyable journey for players seeking a familiar yet enriched adventure.

The pack consists of a mix of mods _not made or owned at all by @Raoden_. All credits go to the mods' original authors. If need be, any mod shall be deleted if solicited.

**Land Of The Losts** is a list of hand, cherry-picked mods for a small public who want a varied mod-pack, where almost everyone will have something to contribute to the world. It does not have as much content as other known mod-packs, but with the right company, that's the last thing you'll notice!
